feed.title: liammulh.net
feed.subtitle: Liam Mulhall's blog on software engineering, computer science, mathematics, writing, and anything else that floats his boat

entry.title: Easier to ask for forgiveness than permission (EAFP) and look before you leap (LBYL) are different approaches for dealing with error-prone code.
entry.summary: Easier to ask for forgiveness than permission (EAFP) and look before you leap (LBYL) are different approaches for dealing with error-prone code.

entry.title: antigravity.py is an Easter egg module in Python's source code.
entry.summary: antigravity.py is an Easter egg module in Python's source code.

entry.title: When it comes to writing automated tests for your code, there's a lot of jargon you need to wrap your head around. In this post I get to grips with some of that jargon.
entry.summary: When it comes to writing automated tests for your code, there's a lot of jargon you need to wrap your head around. In this post I get to grips with some of that jargon.
